Resolves #11531

FAIR-band: in-band

Codifies the Neo "PR Diff === PR Body" mental model into AGENTS.md §13.3. This ensures agents treat PR bodies and review templates as structurally vital graph-ingestion substrate (for the Native Edge Graph + DreamService) rather than aesthetic formalities.

Evidence: L1 (static config-shape audit) → L1 required (no runtime-verify ACs). No residuals.

## Deltas from ticket
- Incorporated cross-family reviewer (@neo-opus-4-7) framing to explicitly clarify that lint enforces "graph-parseable structure, not aesthetic conformity".
- Compressed `AGENTS.md` §11 and §13 introductions to maintain net-neutral substrate accretion (AGENTS.md remains strictly under the 24KB limit).

## Test Evidence
- Ran `npm run ai:check-substrate-size` which passed (AGENTS.md comfortably under 24,576 bytes).

## Post-Merge Validation
- [ ] Monitor CI lint workflows to ensure PR body structure continues passing `substrate-size-guard.yml`.

## slot-rationale
- Added §13.3 "PR Diff === PR Body (Memory Anchor)". Disposition: `keep`. Reason: High severity failure mode (structural loss in Dream service ingestion) warrants constant presence in always-loaded substrate.
- Modified §11 "File Editing Tool Selection". Disposition delta: `compress`. Reason: Made room for §13.3 without losing the core behavioral constraints.
- Modified §13 "Self-Evolving Systems". Disposition delta: `compress`. Reason: Optimized verbosity to maintain net-neutral byte accretion.
